name: Homemade Horseradish and Creamy Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. HORSERADISH: Combine the horseradish root, vinegar, sugar, and salt in a processor or blender. Process until pureed. Carefully remove the cover, keeping your face away from the container. Cover and store in the fridge.
2. SAUCE: In a mixing bowl, whip the heavy cream until soft peaks form. Add mayo and salt; blend thoroughly. Fold in the horseradish. Chill until ready to serve.
Source: Taste of Home
